suggestions.label: Task 1 Academic
suggestions.text: Explain how to write an IELTS Academic Task 1 report describing a graph or chart.

suggestions.label: Task 2 Essay
suggestions.text: How do I structure an IELTS Task 2 essay? Explain the introduction, body paragraphs, and conclusion.

suggestions.label: Reading strategies
suggestions.text: What are the best strategies for the IELTS Reading section? Explain skimming, scanning, and time management.

suggestions.label: Listening tips
suggestions.text: How should I approach each section of the IELTS Listening test?

suggestions.label: Speaking Part 1
suggestions.text: How do I perform well in IELTS Speaking Part 1? Give me example questions and model answers.

suggestions.label: Speaking Part 2
suggestions.text: Explain how to structure a 2-minute IELTS Speaking Part 2 long turn with a cue card.

suggestions.label: Vocabulary
suggestions.text: What vocabulary strategies help most for IELTS? How do I learn and use academic vocabulary effectively?

suggestions.label: Band scores
suggestions.text: How is IELTS scored? Explain the band descriptors for Writing, Speaking, Reading, and Listening.

suggestions.label: Cohesion devices
suggestions.text: Teach me cohesive devices and discourse markers for IELTS Writing and Speaking.

suggestions.label: Time management
suggestions.text: How should I manage my time across all four IELTS sections on exam day?

suggestions.label: Question types
suggestions.text: Explain all the question types in IELTS Reading and how to approach each one.

suggestions.label: Band 7+ tips
suggestions.text: What does it take to score Band 7 or above in each IELTS section?

suggestions.label: GT Task 1 letter
suggestions.text: How do I write an IELTS General Training Task 1 letter? Explain formal, semi-formal, and informal styles.

suggestions.label: Grammar for IELTS
suggestions.text: What grammar structures are most important for IELTS Writing Band 7+?

suggestions.label: Practice
suggestions.text: Give me an IELTS practice question to try.

quickActions.label: Exam overview
quickActions.text: Give me an overview of the IELTS exam.
